brief.pull_quote: Gemini 3.1 Pro scored 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2. GPT-5.2 sits at 52.9%. A 24-point gap is the largest ever recorded on this benchmark.
brief.angle: Not a chatbot upgrade — a category shift. Seven capabilities that separate tool-era from partner-era AI.
brief.title_draft: Gemini 3 broke its own benchmark by 24 points. Seven capabilities that explain why.

slides.copy: Gemini 3 beat the ARC-AGI-2 benchmark by 24 points. The biggest jump ever recorded. Seven capabilities that prove it is a category shift, not a chatbot upgrade.
slides.image_prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 carousel cover slide. Scene: a vertical bar chart rendered as three stacked paper cutouts on a matte dark surface, the rightmost bar visibly taller than the others, a sharp beam of side light casting long geometric shadows, deliberate editorial composition. Render the exact copy 'Gemini 3 beat the ARC-AGI-2 benchmark by 24 points. The biggest jump ever recorded. Seven capabilities that prove it is a category shift, not a chatbot upgrade.' as hero typography, center-aligned inside the middle safe band (strictly NOT inside the top 150px dead zone reserved for the LinkedIn profile overlay, strictly NOT inside the bottom 200px dead zone reserved for swipe indicators), with 75px left and right margins, body text at 24pt minimum (~46-48px at this 1080x1350 resolution), high-contrast sans-serif typeface. Style: cinematic editorial lighting, deep muted palette with one warm accent, light film grain, subtle vignette. No watermark, no extra labels.

slides.copy: Before Gemini 3: an AI that answered from a frozen snapshot of the web. After Gemini 3: a work partner that browses, sketches, transcribes, and decides — grounded in live search and multi-step tool use.

slides.copy: I gave it a hand sketch of a dashboard on a napkin, scanned with a phone in bad light. Twenty seconds later I had a working React app. That was the moment the word assistant stopped fitting.

slides.direct_answer_block: Gemini 3.1 Pro scored 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2, a 24-point lead over GPT-5.2 — the largest gap ever recorded on this benchmark. It delivers gold-medal Olympiad performance, turns hand sketches into working React apps in seconds, runs autonomous browser agents end-to-end, transcribes three-hour multilingual meetings with 50% better structural accuracy, and grounds answers in live Google Search instead of frozen training cutoffs. This is not a chatbot upgrade. It is the tool-to-partner line.

slides.copy: Which capability made you say this changes my workflow tomorrow — the sketch-to-app, the browser agent, or the meeting transcriber? Tell me the one you are running this week. The blog breakdown lives in the first comment.
slides.image_prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 carousel CTA slide.
